issues.title: Ambiguous 'slides' build toolchain
issues.why: 02-runner-contract.md specifies 'Verify bun... if not, fall back to pnpm', but 00-overview.md explicitly mandates 'bun install && bun run build'.
issues.fix: Standardize on Bun as the primary toolchain in 02-runner-contract.md and remove the pnpm fallback to ensure deterministic builds.

issues.title: Missing timeout/retry logic for installers
issues.why: AC-06 mandates a 60-second SLO on a 100Mbps connection, but the contract doesn't specify retry counts or timeout flags for curl/Invoke-WebRequest.
issues.fix: Add mandatory '--connect-timeout 10' and '--retry 3' to the curl/PS command specifications in 01-install-contract.md.

issues.title: Unresolved external script reference
issues.why: 03-release-pipeline.md references a 'release.sh' script and 'release-artifacts/' directory not defined in the provided context.
issues.fix: Add a brief functional summary or file-path reference for the 'release.sh' script within the 03-release-pipeline.md file.
